response.overview: The object movie follows a group of four Firey, Leafy, Coiny, and Pin as they live their lives in the city of objects called object city, after having a successful day at their restaurant Spaghetti World, this thing comes down and starts glitching out the world, and now they must set out on a quest to find legendary God of the object universe CaryKH, and they must find this cure in 24 hours to save their beloved object world.
response.tagline: No object is too small for the BIG screen!
response.title: The Object Movie
